name: Bacon-Topped Cheese Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes and rub skins with vegetable oil.
2. Bake at 400°F for 1 hour or until done. Allow to cool.
3. Cut a 1-inch lengthwise strip from the top of each potato. Carefully scoop out pulp, leaving shells intact.
4. Combine potato pulp and remaining ingredients (except bacon) in a medium mixing bowl.
5. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
6. Stuff shells with potato mixture.
7. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Top with crumbled bacon.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings.
